_comment: Pre-30-1 coverage baseline artifact. Committed with the 30-1 changeset per M-4 rider (AC-T.17 / AC-B.9). Placeholder percentages pending pytest-cov dev-dep install; the baseline file shape is the durable contract. Future stories refresh by running pytest --cov=marcus --cov-report=json and replacing this file.
_note: When pytest-cov is added to dev dependencies, regenerate this file from the closest-available pre-30-1 repo state. Until then the pin at AC-T.17 skips; the baseline-shape test still pins the artifact.

marcus/lesson_plan.note: placeholder; refresh with real pytest-cov output when the dep lands
